description: MM3 / M&M domain invariants for OO extraction — critic uses these to score models and corpus alignment (not TOC taxonomy).

invariants.summary: Check resolution is central: regular, attack, defense, opposed, skill, ability checks share a common resolution family.
Anything that routinely participates in check resolution is usually a trait (skills, abilities, defenses). Effects can also impose or resist checks; traits are the durable character capabilities.
Powers are containers; they apply one or more Effects. Effect categories (sensory, attack, movement, …) are not the same as book TOC section titles.
Damage and Affliction are attack-style effects with shared structure; Affliction is configurable vs fixed resistance paths.
Modifiers (extras/flaws) are a large cross-cutting family; categorize by behavior — not one-to-one with effect categories.

notes_for_automated_critic: Do not promote TOC lines to domain types.
Distinguish book chapter headings from effect categories.
Candidate concepts from evidence still need a promotion gate — sidecar modeling_kind is not approval.
